recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Fermat's Room
recommendations.overview: Four mathematicians are imprisoned in a shrinking room; with the walls closing in, they must try anything to escape this fatal puzzle.

recommendations.title: Escape Room
recommendations.overview: Four friends who partake in a popular Los Angeles escape room find themselves stuck with a demonically possessed killer. They have less than an hour to solve the puzzles needed to escape the room alive.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: Door Lock
recommendations.overview: Kyung-min lives alone in a one-room apartment. One day, she finds traces of a stranger breaking into her room and soon a mysterious murder case begins to unravel.

recommendations.title: Escape Room
recommendations.overview: Six friends test their intelligence when an escape room they participate in takes a dark and twisted turn.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Dreams in the Witch House
recommendations.overview: A college student renting an old room in a boarding house discovers a plot by sinister, otherworldly forces to sacrifice his neighbor's infant.
